name: 101 Garlic Chicken
recipeIngredient: 10 Whole chicken breasts, split, boned, and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in an ungreased baking pan measuring 12 x 16 or 18 inches.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Pour Champagne over the chicken.
4. Arrange the garlic cloves around and between the pieces of chicken.
5. Cover the pan with foil.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1-1/2 hours.
7. Remove the chicken to a large serving platter and place the garlic around it.
8. Serve the chicken with the garlic, allowing guests to suck out the garlic from its skin and enjoy its sweet flavor.
